prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约9072名，2023年约6625名，2024年约13702名（含建筑类等低分专业），2025年物理类最低位次约3024名。近两年位次大幅前移，2025年较 2024年提升约10678名，呈显著上升趋势；2022年理科计划189人，2023年193人，2024年191人，2025年物理类190人；2026年物理类计划152人（不含医学类）， 较2025年缩招约20%。缩招意味着竞争名额减少，对位次有上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2024年第8名，2025-2026年第9名，稳居 全国前十，学校层次极高，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价偏正面：新闻传播学科排名全国前列，食堂数量约35个、人均消费8-15元，在全国高校食堂 排行榜中排名第一，正面舆情有助于提升报考热度。抖音热度总排名第22（较热），2021年曾排名第2（高热），短视频平台曝光度较高。未见明显投档断档记录；A+学科：机械工程、光学工程、电气工程；A学科：计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、动力工程及工程热物理、物理学、管理科学与工程；A-学科：临 床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、新闻传播学、生物医学工程等。优势学科覆盖计算机、电子信息、电气、机械、医学等热门方向，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为2024年高热推荐专业，与华科优势学科高度契合。四川省2026年高考总人数约535,000人，较2025年约462,767人增加约72,23 3人（增幅约15.6%），物理类考生估算约326,350人，竞争加剧。；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，属中 部地区，对四川考生有一定地域吸引力。该校在四川招生人数占比较小（2023年约5.6%），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3024名、2026年物理 类缩招约20%（计划从190人降至152人）、四川考生总数大幅增加约15.6%、学校声誉正面且层次极高、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，但考生大幅增加和学校持续高热度形成对冲。经综合修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约2691名，区间2368-3014名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for science was approximately 9072, in 2023 about 6625, in 2024 about 13702 (including low-score majors like architecture), and in 2025 the minimum rank for physics category was about 3024. In the past two years, the rank has moved forward significantly, with an increase of about 10678 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing a clear upward trend; the science enrollment plan was 189 in 2022, 193 in 2023, 191 in 2024, and 190 for physics category in 2025; the 2026 physics category plan is 152 (excluding medical categories), a reduction of about 20% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer competitive slots, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 8th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, consistently in the national top ten, with an extremely high school level and sustained strong appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive: the journalism and communication discipline ranks among the top in the country, with about 35 canteens and per capita consumption of 8-15 yuan, ranking first in the national university canteen rankings; positive public opinion helps increase application enthusiasm. Douyin heat total ranking 22nd (relatively hot), once ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot), with high exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps; A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering; A disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Physics, Management Science and Engineering; A- disciplines: Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, etc. Advantageous disciplines cover popular directions such as computer science, electronic information, electrical engineering, machinery, and medicine, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation are all highly recommended majors for 2024, highly aligned with HUST's advantageous disciplines. The total number of Sichuan college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 72,233 from about 462,767 in 2025 (an increase of about 15.6%), with an estimated 326,350 physics category candidates, intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is relatively small (about 5.6% in 2023), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline rank of 3024, the 2026 physics category enrollment reduction of about 20% (plan from 190 to 152), the significant increase in total Sichuan candidates of about 15.6%, the positive and high-level school reputation, and the high alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors, but the large increase in candidates and the sustained high popularity of the school offset each other. After comprehensive adjustment, the predicted minimum rank for physics category in 2026 is about 2691, with a range of 2368-3014.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Smart Energy Qiming Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Qiming Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Automation

- Physics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Energy and Power Engineering
- Civil Engineering (Intelligent Construction Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted rank about 2691, range 2368-3014. It is recommended that candidates with a rank within 2368 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Clinical 8-year program, Computer Science); candidates with a rank around 2691 mainly target Tier 2, while also considering the tail-end majors of Tier 1; candidates with a rank near 3014 mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, and can try some Tier 2 majors. HUST has strong engineering strength, with A+ disciplines (Mechanical, Optical, Electrical) and A disciplines (Computer, Control) all being popular employment directions, worth prioritizing.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1120, in 2023 approximately 1193, in 2024 approximately 1476, and in 2025 for history category approximately 1740. Over the past four years, the ranking has continuously shifted backward, with a cumulative shift of about 620 places, showing a year-on-year declining trend; in 2022, the liberal arts plan was 26 students, in 2023 25, in 2024 26, and in 2025 for history category 30; in 2026, the history category plan is 25 students (excluding 4 from medical public service management), a reduction of about 16.7% compared to 2025. The reduction reduces the number of competitive slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 9th nationally in the Soft Science ranking, with an extremely high school level, which also has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with nationally leading cafeteria conditions and a top-ranked journalism and communication discipline. It is hot on Douyin, with overall high attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; A- disciplines: Journalism and Communication, Business Administration; A discipline: Management Science and Engineering. HUST has strong disciplinary strength in liberal arts fields such as journalism and communication, business administration, and economics, attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended (relatively hot), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (influenced by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks). In 2026, the total number of Sichuan college entrance exam takers is approximately 535,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 208,650, an increase of about 30,672 (approximately 17.2%) compared to 2025's approximately 177,978, intensifying competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has a certain appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university enrolls a small number of liberal arts students in Sichuan (30 in history category in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1740, the recent continuous backward trend in history category, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 16.7%, the increase in Sichuan history category candidates by about 17.2%, and the positive school reputation, but the significant increase in candidates and the recent ranking backward trend offset each other. After comprehensive adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for history category in 2026 is approximately 1586, with a range of 1396-1776.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1586, range 1396-1776. Candidates with rankings within 1396 are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature); candidates around ranking 1586 should mainly target Tier 2, while also considering the tail end of Tier 1; candidates near ranking 1776 should use Tier 3 as a safety net. Although HUST's liberal arts majors are limited in number, majors such as Law, Economics, and Journalism and Communication are supported by A- disciplines, offering high cost-effectiveness.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在四川省医学类单独招生的历史最低录取位次波动较大：2022年为10437名（计划41人），2023年上升至7442名（计划41人），2025年大幅下降至12558名（计划58 人）。2021年与2024年数据缺失。2026年医学类总计划为57人，较2025年的58人微减1人，缩招幅度约1.7%，对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其同济医学院是国内顶尖的医学院之一，医学学科实力雄厚， 在西南地区具有很高的认可度和吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。四川省作为人口大省，医学类优质生源充足，考生对华中科技大学同济医学院的报考意愿 强烈。2026年医学类计划微降，进一步加剧了竞争态势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，2026年华中科技大学在四川省医学类最低录取位次预计为12298名，波动区间为11929至12667名。2026年计划微缩，医学热度不减 ，预计位次较2025年略有回升（位次数字减小），竞争程度小幅加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The historical minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Sichuan Province have fluctuated significantly: 2022 was 10437 (plan 41), 2023 rose to 7442 (plan 41), and 2025 dropped sharply to 12558 (plan 58). Data for 2021 and 2024 are missing. The total medical plan for 2026 is 57, a slight decrease of 1 from 2025's 58, a reduction of about 1.7%, with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with strong medical disciplines and high recognition and appeal in the southwestern region.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Sichuan Province, as a populous province, has abundant high-quality medical students, and candidates have a strong willingness to apply to Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College. The slight decrease in the medical plan for 2026 further intensifies the competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive calculation of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of recent ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Sichuan Province in 2026 is expected to be 12298, with a fluctuation range of 11929 to 12667. With the slight contraction of the 2026 plan and undiminished medical popularity, the ranking is expected to slightly recover (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, with a slight increase in competition.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Clinical medicine and stomatology are the most competitive, while preventive medicine and pharmacy categories have relatively moderate admission rankings, and medical laboratory technology and forensic medicine have lower admission thresholds.
